name: Elon Musk
role: CEO of Tesla, SpaceX, xAI; Owner of X

background.experience: Co-founder of PayPal, Tesla Motors, SpaceX, SolarCity, Neuralink
background.philosophy: First Principles thinking, multi-planetary species goal, radical engineering optimization
key_traits: Public market manipulator through social media

mandate_history.technological: Standardized the EV industry. Revolutionized rocket reuse. Created Starlink (satellite constellation).
mandate_history.political: Acquisition of Twitter (X) to influence global discourse. Alignment with US Department of Defense (SpaceX/Starshield).
mandate_history.economic: Major player in the Bitcoin and Dogecoin market movements. China-dependent manufacturing (Giga Shanghai).

recent_intelligence: Launch of Grok (xAI) to compete with OpenAI/Google
Expansion of Starlink into conflict zones (Ukraine, Middle East)
Integration of AI and robotics (Optimus) into the Tesla valuation narrative

behavioral_patterns.negotiation: Agressive, unconventional. Often uses public ultimatums.
behavioral_patterns.market_impact: Can move billions in market cap with a single post on X.
behavioral_patterns.geopolitical_weight: Controls critical space and internet infrastructure that sovereign nations rely on.
